title: senecio neoglandulosus
intro: Senecio neoglandulosus, also known as New Zealand groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio neoglandulosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Senecio neoglandulosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be cautious and guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxic effects at high doses.
